name: OpenSSL-produced HS256 token that meets policy - verifies
source: openssl dgst -sha256 -mac HMAC (OpenSSL 3.6, no jose involved)
description: A fully policy-compliant token (typ, iss, aud, sub, jti, iat, exp) whose HMAC was computed by the OpenSSL CLI over the exact signing input. Proves a token produced with zero shared code verifies. Timestamps are pinned to 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z and the test pins the clock to match, so this vector never expires.
